_meta.description: Generation and wiring notes for recent data bank safety and runtime execution changes.

snippets.title: Retrieval Query Rewrites Safety Upgrade
summary: Rewrite evaluation is now priority-driven with strict condition checks (intent/operator/domain/language).
Guardrails are enforced per rule: negativePatterns[], requireContextAny[], requireContextAll[], forbidContextAny[].
Rewrites now produce structured query variants: { text, weight, sourceRuleId, reason }.
Retrieval executes weighted multi-query variants deterministically instead of concatenating all rewrites into one query string.
Acronym safety example: finance \bap\b rewrite is blocked unless accounts-payable context signals are present.
